summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Digiactiva premium Spanish landing page for Chilean market. All 16 sections verified and functional with excellent user experience.

design_issues.issue: Text contrast ratio could be improved for better accessibility
affected_selectors: p, span, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6
design_issues.details: Contrast ratio detected at 0.45, recommend improving to 0.7+ for better accessibility

passed_tests: All 16 required sections present and functional
Header with sticky navigation and mobile menu toggle working
Hero section with dual CTAs (WhatsApp + Ver planes) working
Trust strip with 4 benefit items displaying correctly
Services section with 4 cards (Formalización, Presencia Digital, Gestión Mensual, Crecimiento)
Pricing section with 5 plans and 'Recomendado' badge on Plan Gestión
Problem/Solution section with comparison items working
Digital Solutions section with image loading correctly
Advisory section with topics and pricing displaying
Digital Advertising section with platforms and includes list
Additional Services grid with all 8 items present
How it works section with 4 steps displaying correctly
Why Digiactiva section with 5 benefits working
FAQ section with 6 accordion items using shadcn Accordion
Final CTA section functional
Footer with logo and WhatsApp link working
Floating WhatsApp button (fixed position bottom right) working
All 20 WhatsApp CTAs link correctly to https://wa.me/56951107102
Smooth scroll navigation from header links working
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
Glassmorphism design with backdrop-filter effects
Outfit and Figtree fonts loaded correctly
Premium color palette (blues/greens) implemented
Smooth animations and hover effects working
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
